title: Trace has "Strange" naming for long, escaped Verilog variables

features.name: escaped identifier with leading dot and multiple dot-separated segments
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier with a leading dot after the backslash, containing multiple dot-separated segments and array subscripts like [0]

features.name: escaped identifier with dots and array subscripts in trace generation
features.description: Code should include multiple escaped identifiers with dots and [0] subscripts used in sequential logic for trace output
